title: Technical Problem Solving, Coding, and Work-Sample Boundaries · Opportunity Brief: Sample Boundary
summary: A timed exercise rewards silent pattern recall while the candidate ignores requirements, changed cases, testing, communication, accessibility, security, tool policy, and task proportionality. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the sample boundary increment in observable technical interview practice system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case p…
objectives: Evaluate take-home scope, ownership, confidentiality, accessibility, tool disclosure, deadline, compensation, and production-use risk before consent.
Use first principles, documentation when allowed, a smaller model, experiment, or explicit partial result when recall fails.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Sample Boundary · Theory Sample Boundary
steps.instruction:
theory case — A timed task begins without contract or tool rules, optimizes before correctness, tests only the sample, and quietly resembles unpaid production work. The theory variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Evaluate take-home scope, ownership, confidentiality, accessibility, tool disclosure, deadline, compensation, and production-use risk before consent.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Sample Boundary contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Sample Boundary · Theory Sample Boundary.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for evaluate take-home scope, ownership, confidentiality, accessibility, tool disclosure, deadline, compensation, and production-use risk before consent. For Predict Sample Boundary · Theory Sample Boundary, keep Sample Boundary connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A timed task begins without contract or tool rules, optimizes before correctness, tests only the sample, and quietly resembles unpaid production work. The theory variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Evaluate take-home scope, ownership, confidentiality, accessibility, tool disclosure, deadline, compensation, and production-use risk before consent.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Sample Boundary condition decided your prediction.

content.text: Evaluate take-home scope, ownership, confidentiality, accessibility, tool disclosure, deadline, compensation, and production-use risk before consent. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A timed task begins without contract or tool rules, optimizes before correctness, tests only the sample, and quietly resembles unpaid production work. The worked example variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Evaluate take-home scope, ownership, confidentiality, accessibility, tool disclosure, deadline, compensation, and production-use risk before consent. A defensible solution applies Sample Boundary, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to observable technical interview practice system.

content.code:
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-4
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Every interview assignment is reasonable because participation is optional. This fails the Sample Boundary contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: GitHub Profile Documentation (GitHub Docs current 2026-07-15) — Controls profile visibility, optional public identity, pinned work, contribution context, and the personal safety consequences of public disclosure.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Evaluate take-home scope, ownership, confidentiality, accessibility, tool disclosure, deadline, compensation, and production-use risk before consent.
